title: Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple
tagline: Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple or Old Srirangam Ranganatha Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Adhi Thiruvarangam in the Taluk of Sankarapuram, Tamil
overview.description: Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple or Old Srirangam Ranganatha Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Adhi Thiruvarangam in the Taluk of Sankarapuram, Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, it is believed to have been built by the Medieval Cholas and Vijayanagar kings. It covers an area of 5 acres (20,000 m2) and has a historical grain storage container. It is classified one among the 108 Abhimana Kshethram of Vaishnavate tradition.

topPlaces.name: Aathiyandal
topPlaces.description: Athiyandal is a village in Tirukkoyilur, Taluk in Kallakurichi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is about 18 km from the town of Thiruvannamalai.

topPlaces.name: Koovanur, Kallakurichi
topPlaces.description: Koovanur is a village in Tirukkoyilur Taluk in Kallakurichi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is about 41.7 km from the town of Kallakurichi.

topPlaces.name: Vanapuram
topPlaces.description: Vanapuram is a panchayat town in Tiruvanamalai district, Tamil Nadu India. It is in Thandarampattu taluk.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (143 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (140 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple?
faq.a: Stays in Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Adhirangam Ranganathaswamy temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Manalurpet, Aathiyandal, Koovanur, Kallakurichi, Vanapuram.
